title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Grief
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to help with grief by reducing anxiety and depression. The flavonoids, specifically quercetin and kaempferol, may help alleviate emotional pain by acting as antioxidants in the brain. The terpenoids, including ginkgolides and bilobalide, may help improve mood by increasing the production of neurotransmitters like serotonin and dopamine.
